behaviors.behavior: A fresh config / write-config with no --mode defaults to single_session
Fresh-write default (single_session) and mode-less READ fallback (multi_session) deliberately diverge

Schema mode.default is multi_session (absent-fallback, matches run_mode) — a schema-default consumer never reinterprets a legacy config
The single-session loop reports wrong_mode for a multi_session AND a mode-less config, coercing the absent mode to multi_session
